mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Cluster topology mode. Maps to a topology in the mariadb ClusterDefinition: standalone (single node), replication (primary/secondary), or galera (multi-primary wsrep).

replicas.title: Replicas
replicas.description: The number of replicas. standalone is always 1 (this value is ignored for standalone); replication needs at least 2; galera needs an odd number, at least 3, for quorum.

storage.title: Storage(Gi)
storage.description: Storage size, the unit is Gi.
